name: product-owner
description: Standalone Product Owner skill for Barter: routes backlog artifacts (tasks, subtasks, parent tasks, bug reports, acceptance criteria) and narrative user stories, plus source-safe product and engineering documentation (guides, catalogs, behavior references, runbooks, API/schema references, architecture documents, technical proposals, decision records), across five intents (Task, Bug, Doc, Story, Interactive) with DEPTH-driven drafting, Human Voice Rules, six-dimension quality gates, and ClickUp-formatted export.
trigger_examples: create a task for the login flow
write a bug report about the checkout crash
document how the feed ranking works
write a user story for saved searches
create an API reference for the deals endpoint
refine this architecture proposal without restructuring it
turn this into a story please
write a runbook for the notification pipeline
